name: components/kbd
description: A styled keyboard key component that visually represents keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys. Provides Kbd and KbdGroup primitives with automatic sizing, monospace font, muted background, and special theming when placed inside TooltipContent. Ideal for help menus, command palettes, and onboarding tooltips that teach shortcuts.
useCases: Command palette shortcut hints such as 'Ctrl + K' or 'Cmd + P'
Onboarding tours and feature-discovery tooltips that explain keyboard navigation
Settings pages listing all available application shortcuts in a readable grid
Inline documentation inside modals or drawers to show alternate input methods
